examples: The majority of the population speaks bantu languages, including tshiluba and kikongao.
Chindali, a Bantu language, has a similar feature.
A state of Uganda and site of a former Bantu kingdom.
Africa's lack of linguistic diversity is due largely to the success of Bantu-speaking people.
The Mijikenda include nine Bantu-speaking ethnic groups in the Kaya forests of coastal Kenya.
